description_long: This object is a compact, modern shotgun with a deep metallic red finish and black textured grip panels. The upper receiver features a prominent Picatinny rail for mounting optics or accessories, and the barrel is vented with multiple oval cutouts for heat dissipation. The front and rear sights are highlighted in green and yellow, providing enhanced aiming visibility. The trigger guard is rounded and generously sized, allowing for gloved use, and the grip is ergonomically contoured with visible fasteners. The overall design is sleek and tactical, with a focus on both functionality and aesthetics.
description: A compact, metallic red shotgun with a black textured grip, vented barrel, and tactical rail. Features green/yellow sights and a rounded trigger guard.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length, metallic red body, black grip, Picatinny rail, and vented barrel.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular barrel opening, green front sight, and top rail alignment.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with grip texture and sight details visible.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the grip, yellow rear sight, and the alignment of the rail and barrel.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with vented ribbing and multiple oval cutouts along the barrel
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, elongated trigger guard with a smooth contour and ample space
